behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all asserted files (ValidateNoRefAccessInRender.ts, shared-runtime.ts, shared-runtime-type-provider.ts, error.validate-mutate-ref-arg-in-render.js, panresponder-ref-in-callback.js, compiler/CLAUDE.md), key identifiers (PanResponder.create, Freeze, ImmutableCapture, Create, Frozen, visitedEffects, isRefLValue, interpolatedAsJsx, mutate, typedLog), and lint/prettier commands.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to change (handle non-hook calls via aliasing effects, add PanResponder type with Freeze/Create/ImmutableCapture) but not exact code; agent still must design the switch/branching.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert on gold-specific implementation details: test_validation_handles_immutable_capture requires the literal string "case 'ImmutableCapture':" and "visitedEffects" and "hookKind == null" - an alternative correct fix using a different control structure (e.g., if-else, different variable name like 'seenEffects', or Map instead of Set) would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Most tests (test_validation_handles_immutable_capture, test_panresponder_type_has_freeze_aliasing, test_mutate_ref_fixture_uses_mutate, test_panresponder_fixture_exists, test_validation_preserves_ref_lvalue_branch) are string grep checks on source files (e.g., src.includes("case 'ImmutableCapture':"), src.includes("visitedEffects")) rather than executing the compiler validation.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub cannot satisfy the grep assertions for specific literal strings in specific files, and lint/jest tests require actual code to compile.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover each file modification called out in the instruction (validation, fixtures, shared-runtime, type-provider, lint command), though behavior coverage is indirect via text checks.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are named descriptively (test_panresponder_runtime_works, test_validation_handles_immutable_capture, etc.) with docstrings explaining intent.

structured_data_schema.reason: No structured data output is produced.

no_typos.reason: File paths and commands appear consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files to modify (expected for this task shape) but does not pinpoint exact buggy lines.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Not an agentmd-edits task; CLAUDE.md doc addition is scoped.
